mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wechat_access_token WHERE token_type = #{tokenType} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wechat_access_token( token_type, access_token, expire_time, version, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{tokenType}, #{accessToken}, #{expireTime}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE access_token = VALUES(access_token), expire_time = VALUES(expire_time), version = version + 1, update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
